auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Cloudflare API token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create a custom token with Browser Rendering - Edit permission from https://dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens/.

extraFields.label: Account ID
extraFields.description: Cloudflare account ID used in Browser Run API paths. Find it from https://developers.cloudflare.com/fundamentals/account/find-account-and-zone-ids/.

actions.name: get_html_content
actions.description: Render a URL or raw HTML with Cloudflare Browser Run and return the fully rendered HTML content.

url.description: The URL Cloudflare Browser Run should navigate to.

html.description: Raw HTML content Cloudflare Browser Run should render.

cacheTtl.description: The Cloudflare Browser Run cache TTL in seconds. Set to 0 to disable caching.

actionTimeout.description: The maximum duration in milliseconds allowed for the browser action after page load.

bestAttempt.description: Whether Cloudflare should proceed when awaited events fail or timeout.

referer.description: The Referer header value used for navigation.

referrerPolicy.description: The referrer policy used for navigation.

anyOf.description: One Puppeteer page load event to wait for.

items.description: One Puppeteer page load event to wait for.

anyOf.description: The page load events Cloudflare should wait for.

waitUntil.description: The page load event or events Cloudflare should wait for.

gotoOptions.description: Puppeteer navigation options forwarded to Cloudflare Browser Run.

setJavaScriptEnabled.description: Whether JavaScript should be enabled on the page.

userAgent.description: The user agent string used by the browser page.

hasTouch.description: Whether the viewport supports touch events.

isLandscape.description: Whether the viewport should emulate landscape orientation.

isMobile.description: Whether the viewport should emulate a mobile device.

viewport.description: Browser viewport options forwarded to Cloudflare Browser Run.

selector.description: The selector Cloudflare should wait for.

hidden.description: Whether Cloudflare should wait for the selector to be hidden.

timeout.description: The selector wait timeout in milliseconds.

visible.description: Whether Cloudflare should wait for the selector to be visible.

waitForSelector.description: Selector wait options forwarded to Cloudflare Browser Run.

waitForTimeout.description: The fixed wait time in milliseconds before extraction.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for the Browser Run content endpoint.

status.description: The HTTP status reported by the rendered page.

title.description: The title reported by the rendered page.

outputSchema.description: The rendered HTML content returned by Cloudflare Browser Run.

prompt.description: The natural language prompt for extracting structured data.

type.description: The response format type accepted by Cloudflare Browser Run.

jsonSchema.description: The JSON schema Cloudflare should use for the structured result.

responseFormat.description: Structured JSON response format options forwarded to Cloudflare Browser Run.

actions.name: list_accounts
actions.description: List Cloudflare accounts accessible to the API token so callers can confirm account IDs used by Browser Run actions.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Cloudflare accounts.

accounts.description: Cloudflare accounts visible to the API token.

count.description: The number of items in the current page.

totalCount.description: The total number of matching items.

outputSchema.description: The Cloudflare accounts visible to the API token.
